title: galium hypocarpium subsp. hypocarpium
intro: Galium hypocarpium subsp. hypocarpium, also known as the False Baby's Breath or Baby's Breath, is a flowering plant species in the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and fever. The health benefits of Galium hypocarpium subsp. hypocarpium include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe digestive discomfort, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory symptoms. Herbal preparations of Galium hypocarpium subsp. hypocarpium can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, though its effectiveness and safety should be verified by a healthcare professional.
